zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Morrison於1596年出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾格拉斯哥時，他的父親Sir George Morrison Jr23歲，母親Margaret Stewart21歲。他於1619年6月4日與Janet Sharpe在蘇格蘭艾斯爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾被列為weaver。他去世於1632年7月28日在蘇格蘭藍納可爾格萬享年36歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭藍納可爾格拉斯哥。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Morrison于1596年出生在苏格兰藍納可爾格拉斯哥时，他的父亲Sir George Morrison Jr23岁，母亲Margaret Stewart21岁。他于1619年6月4日与Janet Sharpe在苏格兰艾斯爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他在英国苏格兰藍納可爾被列为weaver。他去世于1632年7月28日在苏格兰藍納可爾格萬享年36岁，埋葬在苏格兰藍納可爾格拉斯哥。

nameMeanings.name: Morrison
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: from Ó Muirgheasáin ‘descendant of Muirgheasán’, a diminutive of Muirgheas, a personal name meaning ‘sea valor’.
Scottish: from Gaelic Mac Moireasdain ‘son of Moireasdan’, a personal name cognate with Irish Muirgheasán’ (see 1 above).
Scottish and English: patronymic from the personal name   Morris  .

variants.name: Morson
meanings: English, Scottish and Irish: shortened form of   Morrison  .
English: sometimes a variant of Moorsom, a habitational name from Moorsholm in North Yorkshire. The placename derives from Old English mōr ‘moor’ + hūsum, dative plural form of hūs ‘house’.

variants.name: Morris
meanings: English and Scottish: from Maurice, an Old French personal name introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from Latin Mauritius, a derivative of Maurus (see Moore ). This was the name of several early Christian saints. In some cases it may be a nickname of the same derivation for someone with a swarthy complexion.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muirghis, a variant of Ó Muirgheasa (see Morrissey ).

Welsh: Anglicized form of the personal name Meurig (from Latin Mauritius), which was gradually superseded in Wales by Morus, Morys, a derivative of the Anglo-Norman French form of the name (see 1 above).

variants.name: McCorriston
meanings: Scottish (Wigtownshire): probably from Mac Thoireasdain ‘son of Tòireasdan or Tòrasdan’, a Gaelicized form of the Old Norse name Thórrsteinn ‘thunder stone’. It may also be from a lenited form of Gaelic Mac Moireasdain ‘son of Moireasdan’; see Morrison .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Morrison was born in 1596, in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, his father, Sir George Morrison Jr, was 23 and his mother, Margaret Stewart, was 21. He married Janet Sharpe on 4 June 1619, in Ayrshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. His occupation is listed as weaver in Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. He died on 28 July 1632, in Govan, Lanarkshire, Scotland, at the age of 36, and was buried in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Morrison est né en 1596, à Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Écosse, son père, Sir George Morrison Jr, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Margaret Stewart, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Janet Sharpe le 4 juin 1619, à Ayrshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est weaver à Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 28 juillet 1632, à Govan, Lanarkshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterré à Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Morrison 1596 in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir George Morrison Jr 23 und seine Mutter Margaret Stewart 21. Er hat am 4. Juni 1619 in Ayrshire, Scotland Janet Sharpe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als weaver in Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 28. Juli 1632 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Govan, Lanarkshire, Scotland und wurde in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Morrison è nato il nel 1596 nel Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir George Morrison Jr, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Stewart, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Janet Sharpe il 4 giugno 1619, nel Ayrshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come weaver nel Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Morì il 28 luglio 1632, nel Govan, Lanarkshire, Scotland, all'età di 36 anni, e fu sepolto a Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Morrisonが1596年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアグラスゴウで生まれた時，父Sir George Morrison Jrは23歳，母Margaret Stewartは21歳であった。1619年6月4日にスコットランドエイルシュアイアでJanet Sharpeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。イギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアでの職業はweaverと記録されている。彼は1632年7月28日にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアゴヴァンで36歳で死去し，スコットランドラナルクシュアイアグラスゴウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Morrison(이)가 1596년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 글라스고에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir George Morrison Jr(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Stewart(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1619년 6월 4일 스컷랜드 에이르실르에서 Janet Sharpe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르에서 weaver이었다. 그는 1632년 7월 28일 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 고반에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 글라스고에 묻혔다.

mn.East Lothian, Scotland: Lodainn an Ear, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Morrison nasceu em 1596, em Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir George Morrison Jr, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Stewart, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Janet Sharpe em 4 de junho de 1619, em Ayrshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como weaver em Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 28 de julho de 1632, em Govan, Lanarkshire, Scotland, com 36 anos, e foi sepultado em Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Morrison родился в 1596 г. в местности гласгоу, ланаркшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir George Morrison Jr было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Stewart, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Janet Sharpe 4 июня 1619 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери.  Он работал по профессии weaver в местности ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. Он умер 28 июля 1632 г. в местности гован, ланаркшир, Шотландия в возрасте 36 лет и был похоронен в местности гласгоу, ланаркшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Morrison nació en 1596, en Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir George Morrison Jr, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Margaret Stewart, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Janet Sharpe el 4 de junio de 1619, en Ayrshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era weaver en Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Murió el 28 de julio de 1632, en Govan, Lanarkshire, Scotland, a la edad de 36 años, y fue sepultado en Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland.
